allow: Bash(for f in components/B2C/CheckoutPage.tsx components/B2C/OrderSuccessPage.tsx src/legacy-pages/BuyerMarketplace.tsx src/legacy-pages/SupplierDashboard.tsx src/legacy-pages/SupplierProfile.tsx src/legacy-pages/ProductDetail.tsx src/legacy-pages/RFQSystem.tsx src/legacy-pages/MessagingSystem.tsx src/legacy-pages/OrderManagement.tsx src/legacy-pages/Checkout.tsx)
